"user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45773", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-352", "name": "Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)"}], "description": "### Impact

Turborepo's self-hosted login and SSO browser flows did not validate a CSRF state value on the localhost callback. While the CLI was waiting for authentication, a malicious web page could send a request to the local callback server with an attacker-controlled token. If accepted before the legitimate callback, the CLI could complete login with the wrong credentials.

This affects users authenticating the `turbo` CLI against self-hosted remote cache/auth endpoints. Vercel-hosted login flows using device authorization are not affected.

### Fix

The login and SSO redirect flows now generate a random state value, include it in the browser authentication URL, and require the same value on the localhost callback before accepting a token. Callbacks with a missing or mismatched state are rejected.

### Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade immediately, avoid browser-based self-hosted `turbo login` or SSO flows on machines that may load untrusted web content during authentication. Use a pre-provisioned token or environment-based authentication instead.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00124, "percentile": 0.02506}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T19:49:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45773"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T16:16:15Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T19:49:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/turborepo/security/advisories/GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45773", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/turborepo/security-advisories/GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/turborepo", "summary": "Turbo: Login callback CSRF/session fixation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T15:30:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hcf7-66rw-9f5r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.9.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "turbo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.9.13"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Turbo: Login callback CSRF/session fixation
